description: A global standard with 12 dimensions for evaluating landscape-level regenerative impact.

dimensions.name: Air & Climate
dimensions.farm_outcome: Reduce GHG emissions and increase carbon sequestration per acre
dimensions.landscape_outcome: Improve regional air quality and climate resilience metrics

dimensions.name: Biodiversity
dimensions.farm_outcome: Increase species richness and habitat connectivity on-farm
dimensions.landscape_outcome: Restore biodiversity corridor integrity and pollinator habitat coverage

dimensions.name: Soil
dimensions.farm_outcome: Build soil organic matter and improve water infiltration
dimensions.landscape_outcome: Increase regional soil carbon stocks and reduce erosion rates

dimensions.name: Water
dimensions.farm_outcome: Improve on-farm water retention and reduce nutrient runoff
dimensions.landscape_outcome: Improve watershed water quality and wetland coverage across the region

dimensions.name: Livestock
dimensions.farm_outcome: Improve animal welfare and integrate managed grazing
dimensions.landscape_outcome: Reduce methane intensity and improve grassland health regionally

dimensions.name: Crops & Pasture
dimensions.farm_outcome: Diversify rotations and increase cover crop adoption
dimensions.landscape_outcome: Increase regional crop diversity index and regenerative practice adoption

dimensions.name: Community
dimensions.farm_outcome: Strengthen food security contribution and local food integration
dimensions.landscape_outcome: Strengthen local food economy and community land ownership

dimensions.name: Farmers & Workers
dimensions.farm_outcome: Improve farmworker wages and beginning farmer access
dimensions.landscape_outcome: Increase farm viability and beginning farmer entry rates regionally

dimensions.name: Governance
dimensions.farm_outcome: Increase producer decision autonomy and cooperative participation
dimensions.landscape_outcome: Strengthen farmer-led governance and cooperative structures regionally

dimensions.name: Economics & Finance
dimensions.farm_outcome: Improve net farm income and revenue diversification
dimensions.landscape_outcome: Increase regional farm profitability and economic resilience

dimensions.name: Agricultural Inputs
dimensions.farm_outcome: Reduce synthetic fertilizer and pesticide dependency
dimensions.landscape_outcome: Decrease aggregate chemical input loading across the region

dimensions.name: Infrastructure
dimensions.farm_outcome: Improve energy self-sufficiency and on-farm processing capacity
dimensions.landscape_outcome: Strengthen regional food processing and renewable energy infrastructure
